[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100101 4
1 1010000 2
2 0000000 a
3 1010111 5
4 0000000 a
5 1000001 2
6 1001110 4
7 0000000 a

01 10 1000001 2 match 5

61 16 0000000 a match 2 4 7
72 27 1010111 5 match 3

37 73 0000110 2
